channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Could the US-Israel war with Iran fuel global inflation?
item.description: Oil prices are swinging as markets react to every twist in the conflict.

item.title: Is control of Iran’s natural resources a factor in US strategy?
item.description: Iran has vast oil as well as gas reserves and is a key supplier to China.

item.title: German Chancellor concerned US-Israel have no exit plan for Iran war
item.description: German Chancellor said there appears to be “clearly no joint plan” to bring the US-Israeli war on Iran to an end.

item.title: Five stories you may have missed amid US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description: Here are some news stories you might not have seen amid the United States-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: ‘America has no narrative for victory’
item.description: Andreas Krieg says the US is lacking a clear narrative for what victory in the war with Iran looks like.

item.title: Moment ‘Hezbollah missile’ strikes Israeli radar station
item.description: Israel has released video it says shows the moment a missile fired by Hezbollah struck a satellite and radar station.

item.title: WHO warns of health risks from ‘black rain’ in Iran
item.description: The World Health Organization warned that “black rain” caused by strikes on Iran’s oil facilities pose health risks.

item.title: Global airlines hike ticket prices as Iran war sends costs soaring
item.description: The war has sent oil prices surging, upending global travel and pushing airline ticket costs on some routes sky-high.

item.title: ‘Our hearts were shaking’: Tehran residents endure heavy Israel-US bombing
item.description: The latest attacks come a day after bombing of fuel reserves created thick plumes of smoke that turned day into night.

item.title: IEA due to meet as member states mull releasing oil reserves amid Iran war
item.description: International Energy Agency chief says talks aim to assess conditions as US-Israel war on Iran fuels global uncertainty.
